political.s: FEC: $791K in executive political donations; partisan lean Democratic +60 across 26 executive donors.

charity.s: $36M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.18% of revenue) via Adobe Foundation. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #10 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #12 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #28 (2024). Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #41 (2024). Operates the Adobe Foundation: $15.0M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).
charity.focus: Creative education, digital literacy, social equity, community development, HBCUs, HSIs

environment.s: JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #10 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. CDP A-List (2024) — top tier for climate disclosure and emissions-reduction action. Climate-commitment coalition member: RE100 (since 2016; target 2035). 100% renewable energy globally by 2035; achieved at US headquarters. Held by 3 ESG/SRI fund(s) (domini, pax-world, trillium) — investor-screen positive signal.

dei.s: JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #10 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. Held by 1 ESG/SRI fund(s) (gender-equality-funds) — investor-screen positive signal.

animals.s: Salmon-Safe certified at multiple Pacific Northwest offices. [Salmon-Safe]

privacy.s: 1 documented breach affecting 152,445,165 accounts (HIBP); latest breach 2013-10-04.

execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 217:1 (median employee pay $235,989; CEO total compensation $2K) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2023).

wiki.industry: software industry, information technology, software development, artificial intelligence
wiki.extract: Adobe Inc., formerly Adobe Systems Incorporated, is an American multinational computer software company based in San Jose, California. It offers a wide range of programs from web design tools, photo manipulation, and vector creation to video and audio editing, mobile app development, print layout, and animation software.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Acrobat and Reader Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contain a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability which could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted PDF file that triggers memory corruption.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

topCves.shortDescription: Adobe Acrobat contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows for code execution
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Acrobat and Reader Prototype Pollution Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contain a prototype pollution vulnerability that allows for arbitrary code execution.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Commerce and Magento Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source contain an improper input validation vulnerability that could allow an attacker to take over customer accounts through the Commerce REST API.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Experience Manager Forms Code Execution Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Adobe Experience Manager Forms in JEE contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for arbitrary code execution.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during regular operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was rolling a tarp using a tarp roller. His right arm was caught in the roller and fractured. He was hospitalized.
